Last updated: march 26, 2025  

When you visit aromawax.eu (referred to as the “site”), make a purchase, or interact with us about our offerings (collectively, our “services”), we collect certain information about you. We are aromawax.eu—referred to as “we,” “us,” or “our” in this policy—and this page explains what personal information we gather, how we use it, and what we do to protect it. 

What personal information we collect  

Information you provide directly  
We collect details you share with us when you use our services, such as placing an order or contacting us. This includes:  
- contact information: your name, address, phone number, and email, which we need to communicate with you.  
- order information: details like your name, billing and shipping addresses, payment confirmation, email, and phone number to process your purchases.  
- account information: your username, password, and security questions to set up and secure your account.  
- shopping information: data about what you view, add to your cart, save (such as loyalty points, reviews, referrals, or gift cards), or buy.  
- customer support information: anything you include when you reach out to us, like a message sent through the site.  

Information we collect automatically

As you use our site, we gather some data about how you interact with it, known as “usage data.” we use tools like cookies, pixels, and similar technologies to do this. This data might include:  
- how you access and navigate the site.  
- technical details like your device type, browser, network connection, and ip address.  
- records of your interactions, such as pages visited or items clicked.  

Information from third parties

We also receive information about you from external sources that assist us, including:  
- companies that support our site and services, such as shopify, which powers our online store.  
- payment processors that handle your payment details (e.G., bank account or card information, billing address) to complete your orders.  
- partners who track how you engage with our emails, ads, or site using technologies like pixels or web beacons.  
All information from these sources is handled according to this policy. See “third party websites and links” below for related details.

How we use your personal information  

We use your information for specific purposes tied to running our business and serving you:  

- to provide products and services: we need your details to process payments, fulfill orders, send account or purchase updates, manage your account, arrange shipping, and handle returns or exchanges. This ensures we can deliver what you’ve asked for under our agreement with you.  
- for marketing and advertising: we may use your information to send you emails, texts, or mail about products, promotions, or ads tailored to your interests. If you’re in the eea, this is based on our legitimate interest in promoting our products, as allowed by gdpr article 6(1)(f).  
- for security and fraud prevention: we use your data to detect and address potential fraud, illegal activity, or security risks. If you have an account, it’s your responsibility to keep your login details secure—please don’t share them, and contact us immediately if you suspect a breach. For eea residents, this is grounded in our legitimate interest in maintaining a safe site, per gdpr article 6(1)(f).  
- to communicate and improve: we use your information to respond to your questions, enhance our services, and maintain our relationship with you. This aligns with our legitimate interest in supporting you effectively, also per gdpr article 6(1)(f) for eea users.  

About cookies  

We use cookies—small files that help our site function—along with similar technologies. These allow us to:  
- power and improve the site, like remembering your preferences.  
- analyze how you use our services to make them better (this is in our interest to optimize things).  
- work with partners to refine ads or services you see.  
For specifics on cookies tied to shopify, visit [shopify.com/legal/cookies](https://www.shopify.com/legal/cookies).  

Your browser likely accepts cookies automatically, but you can adjust its settings to decline them. Keep in mind that doing so might affect how the site works—some features may not function fully. Even if you block cookies, we might still share some data with advertising partners.

How we share your personal information  

We may share your information with others in certain situations, always in line with this policy:  
- with service providers: companies that help us operate, like shopify, payment processors, shipping firms, or customer service teams.  
- with business or marketing partners: to offer services or advertise to you—they’ll follow their own privacy policies.  
- with your permission: if you ask us to share—like for shipping—or use features like social media logins, we’ll do so with your consent.  
- within our company: to affiliates in our corporate group, supporting our business operations.  
- for legal or business reasons: to meet legal requirements (e.G., responding to subpoenas), enforce our terms, or protect our rights and users.  

We share categories like your contact details, order history, browsing data, and approximate location (from your ip) with these groups for the purposes above. We don’t use or share sensitive information without your consent or to guess things about you.

Children’s information  

Our services are designed for adults, not children. We don’t knowingly collect data from kids. If you’re a parent or guardian and believe your child’s information has reached us, please contact us to have it removed. As of now, we don’t “sell” or “share” (as defined by law) data from anyone under 16.

Security and retention  

No security is foolproof, but we take steps to protect your information. Data sent to us might not be secure in transit, so we suggest avoiding unsecured methods for sensitive details. We keep your information only as long as needed—for your account, to provide services, meet legal duties, or resolve disputes—then securely dispose of it.

Our site may include links to external websites or platforms we don’t control. If you visit them, review their privacy and security policies — information you share publicly, like on social media, can be seen by others and isn’t limited by us.

Your rights  

Depending on your location, you may have rights over your personal information, though they’re not absolute and may vary:  
- access: request to see what we have about you and how we use or share it.  
- deletion: ask us to remove your information.  
- correction: tell us to fix anything inaccurate.  
- opt-out: stop us from “selling” or “sharing” your info for targeted ads (we’ll respect global privacy control signals where applicable).  
- restrict processing: ask us to pause using your data.  
- withdraw consent: if we rely on your permission, you can take it back.  
- appeal: challenge our response if we deny your request.  

You can unsubscribe from promotional emails using the link in them, though we’ll still send account-related messages. To exercise these rights, contact us below. We may verify your identity first and won’t penalize you for asking. If someone’s acting for you, we’ll need proof of authorization.

Your information might be processed outside your country by us or our partners. For european users, we use approved mechanisms like standard contractual clauses to ensure it’s protected, unless it’s going to a place already deemed safe. Your personal information will be transferred outside of europe for storage and further processing, including to canada and the united states. For more information on how data transfers comply with the gdpr, see shopify’s gdpr whitepaper: https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/your-account/privacy/gdpr.

If you’re concerned about how we handle your data, reach out to us first using the details below. If we can’t resolve it, you may appeal to us or contact your local data protection authority (eea list at https://edpb.europa.eu/about-edpb/about-edpb/members_en).

Updates to this policy  

We may revise this policy to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. Updates will be posted here with a new “last updated” date, and we’ll follow any laws about notifying you.

Contact us  

Have questions, complaints or want to use your rights? Email us at support@aromaswax.eu or call +34 614 410 662

We have a 14-day return policy, which means you have 14 days after receiving your item to request a return. 

To be eligible for a return, your item must be in the same condition that you received it, unworn or unused, with tags, and in its original packaging. You’ll also need the receipt or proof of purchase.

To start a return, you can contact us at support@aromawax.eu. Please note that returns will need to be sent to the following address: [INSERT RETURN ADDRESS]

If your return is accepted, we’ll send you a return shipping label, as well as instructions on how and where to send your package. Items sent back to us without first requesting a return will not be accepted.

You can always contact us for any return question at support@aromawax.eu. 

Damages and issues
Please inspect your order upon reception and contact us immediately if the item is defective, damaged or if you receive the wrong item, so that we can evaluate the issue and make it right.

Exceptions / non-returnable items
Certain types of items cannot be returned, like perishable goods (such as food, flowers, or plants), custom products (such as special orders or personalized items), and personal care goods (such as beauty products). We also do not accept returns for hazardous materials, flammable liquids, or gases. Please get in touch if you have questions or concerns about your specific item.

Unfortunately, we cannot accept returns on sale items or gift cards.

Exchanges
The fastest way to ensure you get what you want is to return the item you have, and once the return is accepted, make a separate purchase for the new item.

European Union 14 day cooling off period
Notwithstanding the above, if the merchandise is being shipped into the European Union, you have the right to cancel or return your order within 14 days, for any reason and without a justification. As above, your item must be in the same condition that you received it, unworn or unused, with tags, and in its original packaging. You’ll also need the receipt or proof of purchase.

Refunds
We will notify you once we’ve received and inspected your return, and let you know if the refund was approved or not. If approved, you’ll be automatically refunded on your original payment method within 10 business days. Please remember it can take some time for your bank or credit card company to process and post the refund too.
If more than 15 business days have passed since we’ve approved your return, please contact us at support@aromawax.eu.

At AROMA AND WAX, we aim to deliver your candle-making and diffuser ingredients efficiently. This Shipping Policy outlines how we calculate shipping costs, estimated delivery times, and options available to you based on your location.

Shipping Costs

The cost of shipping depends on your location, the total weight of your order, and the number of packages needed to ship your items. To help you plan, we provide a shipping cost calculator in your shopping cart and before you finalize your purchase, allowing you to preview the fees prior to checkout.

Deliveries within the EU

For customers located in the European Union, your order will not incur additional customs duties or clearance fees. If you have a VAT number, please include it during checkout so we can deduct the VAT from your total. For orders placed outside the EU, please be aware that additional customs or clearance charges may apply, depending on your country’s regulations.

Shipping to Spain and Europe

We partner with trusted carriers such as Seur, Correos, FedEx and UPS to ship orders across Spain and Europe.

  • Spain: Delivery typically takes 1-2 working days from the time your order is dispatched.
  • Rest of Europe: Delivery usually takes 2-4 working days from dispatch.

You also have the option to pick up your order directly from our warehouse in Barcelona. Contact us at support@aromawax.eu  for details on how to arrange this.

International Shipping

We proudly ship worldwide! Delivery times vary depending on your location. Our online store suggests shipping providers and estimated delivery timing.  For an estimated delivery timeline tailored to your destination or other conditions, please reach out to our customer service team at support@aromawax.eu

Wholesale Orders

For bulk or wholesale purchases, you may use your preferred transport company to handle shipping. To arrange this, email us at support@aromawax.eu with your requirements. Our team will coordinate with you to organize the logistics. Once your order is prepared, we’ll send you an invoice and, after it’s picked, inspected, and packed, you’ll receive an email with the parcel dimensions and weight. This information will allow you to schedule a pickup with your chosen courier.

Return Policy

We are committed to ensuring your satisfaction with every purchase of candle-making and diffuser ingredients. Our Return Policy explains your rights and our processes for cancellations, returns, and refunds, in line with European Union consumer protection laws and Spanish consumer regulations. Please review this policy carefully before purchasing.

Returning Products

You may cancel your order and return the goods within 14 calendar days from the date you receive them. To initiate cancellation and return, please email us at support@aromawax.eu, and our team will guide you through the process. 

The goods must be unused, in perfect condition, and packaged either in its original packaging or, if not available, in adequate protective wrapping to prevent damage during transit. The returned item must reach us within 28 days from the date of the original delivery. You are responsible for return shipping costs, and we cannot credit items that arrive damaged or are lost in transit.

For fragrance oils, other liquid-based products (such as Augeo) and wicks, returns are not accepted under any circumstances due to hygiene, safety, and tampering concerns. We advise purchasing sample sizes to ensure you are satisfied with these products before ordering larger quantities. 

Refund Procedure

Once received, the returned goods are inspected by the customer service team. If approved, your refund will be processed within 14 days and credited back to your original payment method, minus any delivery charges, as permitted by EU and Spanish law. If the return is due to an error on our part (e.g., a defective product), we will cover return shipping costs and waive the delivery charge deduction.

Handling Damaged Goods

If your order arrives damaged, including fragrance oils, Augeo, or other liquids, please notify us within three days  of receipt by emailing  support@aromawax.eu. We strongly suggest inspecting the package and the goods when receiving them. In this case, if damage is detected, you can send the damaged package back to us with the same courier. For liquids, do not open bottles. Instead, weigh it on a digital scale, take photographs showing any damage or leakage, and send these to us. We will evaluate the situation and, at our discretion, offer a refund or replacement. Please note:

  • We cannot issue a refund or replacement for any liquid product if the seal is broken.
  • For fragile items like glass jars (sold in packs of six), we may opt to refund rather than replace, and refunds will only apply to the damaged items within the pack.
